title: lepidagathis parviflora
intro: Lepidagathis parviflora is a plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae, commonly known as the "small-flowered lepidagathis." This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. Lepidagathis parviflora has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and exhibiting hepatoprotective properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various ailments, and it is also used in traditional Indian medicine, Ayurveda.
